name: Count-question single-value probe (iter 5)
description: Tests the COUNT QUESTIONS MUST PRODUCE A SINGLE-VALUE SPEC prompt clause (hot-reloaded into copilot-text.json). 3 cases that previously failed with wrong-rowcount-direction (got many rows when count expected) + 2 cumulative controls.

Scenarios.Question: how many open tickets
Scenarios.Notes: From B-AGG-002. Previously returned a list of 78 tickets. With the new clause, MUST produce empty select + COUNT(*) aggregation = 1 row.

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد الانقطاعات الحرجة
Scenarios.Notes: From B-AR-COUNT-006 (how many critical outages). Arabic count verb 'كم عدد' must trigger same single-value shape.

Scenarios.Question: top 5 customers by total bill amount
Scenarios.Notes: Cumulative control — iter 1 label fix + ranked aggregate must still produce 5 rows.

Scenarios.Question: show me tickets
Scenarios.Notes: Control — basic LIST shape must NOT become a COUNT. The clause only fires for explicit count verbs.
